reviews.comment:
Dsps de 40 minutos de fila. Llegamos. 2 surtidores en vez de los 4 disponibles. Y no solo eso, 1 sola persona atendiendo que para colmo era un limitado para el trabajo, 20 minutos para cargarme 10 litros de nafta y cobrarme. La verdad que si podría poner 0 estrellas sería más certera mi reseña. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
After waiting in line for 40 minutes, we finally arrived. There were only two pumps instead of the four that were supposed to be available. And not only that, there was only one person working, who, to top it all off, was clearly out of his depth. It took 20 minutes to fill up my tank with 10 liters of gas and charge me. Honestly, if I could give it zero stars, my review would be more accurate. It's a disgrace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5eVllblF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Quise comprar una gaseosa que figuraba 90 y me quiso cobrar 100 pesos y cuando le pedí un ticket me quería dar un papel diciéndome de que no tenían tickets esto fue en el turno de la noche

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to buy a soda that was listed at 90 pesos and they tried to charge me 100 pesos, and when I asked for a receipt they tried to give me a piece of paper saying they didn't have receipts. This happened during the night shift.
